title: The College Of Science (The Rocky Road To Dublin)
content:
Who knows a thing and will not tell
        Shall spend eternity in hell;
        But he who learns and teaches free
        In heaven spends eternity.

        Around the Leinster Lawn we go
        Into Molesworth Street, and so
        To Saint Stephen's Green, where we
        Hang a banner on a tree.
meaning:
James Stephens's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The College Of Science (The Rocky Road To Dublin)"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
